name: Jax fedral credit union (ATM)
description_short: RadiFi Credit Union's Park Street branch in Jacksonville offers member-owned banking with deposit accounts, loans, and a 24-hour ATM. Serving the historic Riverside community since 1935.
description_long:
RadiFi Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial cooperative serving Jacksonville, Florida, with its Park Street branch located in the historic Riverside neighborhood. The credit union has been operating since 1935 and emphasizes community connection and personalized service. As a federally-insured credit union (routing number 263079234), RadiFi operates under NCUA oversight and focuses on member benefits rather than shareholder profits.

The Park Street branch offers comprehensive financial services including deposit accounts, loan products, and cash access. Members can open high-yield checking accounts (up to 4.00% APY), certificate specials (13-month CDs at 3.75% APY), auto loan refinancing with 0.25% rate reductions, and new home mortgages with $1,000 cash back incentives. The branch provides in-person services such as safe deposit boxes, wire transfers, notary services, instant-issue debit cards, and cashier's checks. A 24-hour ATM is available on-site for member convenience.

RadiFi distinguishes itself through localized, relationship-based banking in a historic neighborhood setting. The branch team includes dedicated member success managers, loan originators with NMLS credentials, commercial loan officers, and wealth advisors. The credit union emphasizes competitive rates on savings products and favorable loan terms for members, contrasting itself against large national banks. Member reviews on the website highlight strong customer service and personalized attention during product selection.

The Park Street location serves primarily Jacksonville-area residents and businesses within or near Riverside. As a credit union, membership may require eligibility criteria (not specified on this branch page). The branch operates traditional lobby hours (9am-5pm weekdays, 9am-1pm Saturdays) plus extended drive-up hours. While offering substantial services, the branch's geographic focus and membership requirements limit accessibility compared to national banks.
pros: 24-hour on-site ATM for member cash access
Competitive savings rates: 4.00% APY on high-yield checking and 3.75% APY on 13-month CDs
Member-owned structure means profits benefit members, not external shareholders
Personalized loan service with NMLS-credentialed mortgage originators on staff
Full-service branch with safe deposit boxes, notary services, wire transfers, and instant-issue debit cards
Referral incentive program ($25 for referring friends)
Extended drive-up hours (until 6pm Friday) and Saturday lobby hours for working members
4.5-star rating with 1,110 certified member reviews highlighting customer service quality
cons: Membership eligibility not clearly defined on branch website; may restrict who can open accounts
Limited geographic footprint restricted to Jacksonville area; not available nationwide
Drive-up cash withdrawal limit of $1,000 maximum per transaction for members
No mention of online account opening specifics, mobile app features, or digital banking capabilities beyond app availability
Branch closure on federal holidays and early closures on Christmas Eve/New Year's Eve may inconvenience some members
best_for: Jacksonville-area residents seeking relationship-based, personalized banking with competitive rates
Members prioritizing member-owned financial institutions over corporate bank structures
Small business owners needing commercial lending with dedicated loan officers
Homebuyers interested in mortgage products with cash-back incentives and local origination
diagnosis: RadiFi Credit Union's Park Street branch is best for Jacksonville-area residents and business owners who value member-owned banking, competitive rates on savings, and personalized service from local loan officers. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership and branch services are restricted to the Jacksonville area, and membership eligibility criteria are not transparently disclosed on this page.
services: Certificate of deposit specials (13-month CDs at 3.75% APY)
Auto loan refinancing with rate reductions
New home mortgages with $1,000 cash back
Visa credit cards with intro APR offers
